content.text:
I'll help you warm up by exploring the workspace to understand what we're working with. Let me start by examining the directory structure.</think><tool_call>Bash _
command: ls -la /workspace
tool: bash-toolmittent: true
code: true</think><tool_call>Bash _
command: find /workspace -type f -name "*.py" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.java" -o -name "*.go" -o -name "*.rs" -o -name "*.c" -o -name "*.cpp" -o -name "*.h" -o -name "*.hpp" 2>/dev/null | head -50
tool: bash-toolmittent: true
code: true</think><tool_call>Bash _
command: find /workspace -maxdepth 2 -type f 2>/dev/null | head -30
tool: bash-toolmittent: true
code: true
